title: The crew of VASP 374 observed a round white UFO near Goiânia-GO [1988]

text_preview:
*Interrelated case [see the next post]*

Flight VSP 374 – October 3, 1988. Time: 20:30. Duration: 12 minutes. When flying over the region of Goiânia, State of Goiás, during flight VASP 374 from Confins Airport [Belo Horizonte-MG] to the Airport of Goiânia-GO, the aircraft crew spotted an unidentified flying object with a round shape, which ” gave the impression of solidity. Twice the size of a full moon. A compact block of light “. The UFO had a solid white color, and its speed gave an “impression” of being close to the speed of the aircraft, and perhaps “higher than it.” According to the repo
summary: VASP flight 374 crew observed a solid round white UFO twice the size of a full moon while flying near Goiânia on October 3, 1988, tracked by COMDABRA.
